title: Losing another friend
body:
I’ve noticed in life certain situations cause you to lose friends. Weddings. Financial loss. Sickness. Etc. I knew I would lose some friends but I didn’t think how much this one would sting.

I have a friend who has always been holistic. And I feel like that’s being polite. I’ve always been a mixed bag. Western meets holistic. Sure I’m taking chemo but I’m also focusing on my diet. If she got cancer should would probably skip chemo. Not because it’s poison but because you can’t trust big pharma.

She anti vax and recently started at some off charter chiropractic school. Which is where I think the aggression and blind faith around her ideals comes from. 

She been posting non stop anti vax shit on line. Yesterday I tried to reach out and share the sentiment that is about community. Looking out for others. Not impacting the hospitals.  She wasn’t getting it.  So I said what about me. What if did get covid and not survive it. I mean I have the blood work to prove my immune system is shit. 

She told me. My close friend of 8 years. That it wouldn’t matter if I died. She did apologize for being harsh. But she doubled down that my life doesn’t matter. 

I asked how someone who claims to care about the health and wellness of others could be so cold. 

Now this is the kicker. She said i probably got sick by not being healthy enough. That if I ha a better diet I wouldn’t have gotten cancer. 

I told her to get fucked and blocked her. She hasn’t been around this whole time. She doesn’t even know what kind of cancer I have, or the genetic markers. Nothing. 

I am just so beyond disgusted. I want to badly to text her and tell her what vile human she is. But trash really isn’t worth more energy than taking it to the curb. So here I am. Complaining to you guys. 

If you’re still reading thank you. I know this is stupid but I just hurts knowing your life means so little to someone you regarded as a friend.

Edit: I knew this was the right place for me. I didn’t know how much I needed to hear from you guys. I’m only 29 and I spent my whole pregnancy going through treatment. At times I feel so alone but then I come here and you ladies never ever let me feel that way. I wish I could see each and everyone of you face to face and say thank you. 

Fuck Cancer and all it’s taken from us.
